# SvelteKit Server Functions (Current Patterns)

## Purpose

Documents the current SvelteKit server-side patterns as migration source-of-truth. These patterns will be replaced by TanStack Start `createServerFn` during migration.

## Server Load Functions

Load functions run on the server and return data to page components.

```typescript
// src/routes/orgs/+page.server.ts
import prisma from "$lib/server/prisma";
import type { PageServerLoad } from "./$types";

export const load: PageServerLoad = async ({ params, locals, url }) => {
  const page = parseInt(url.searchParams.get("page") || "1");
  const orgs = await prisma.org.findMany({
    where: { deleted: null },
    skip: (page - 1) * 10,
    take: 10,
  });
  return { orgs, page };
};
```

**Key features:**

- Auto-typed via `./$types` generated by SvelteKit
- Access to `params`, `locals`, `url`, `cookies`, `request`
- Return value becomes `data` prop in the page component
- Runs during SSR and on client-side navigation (via fetch)

## Layout Load Functions

Same pattern, but data is available to all child routes:

```typescript
// src/routes/+layout.server.ts
import type { LayoutServerLoad } from "./$types";

export const load: LayoutServerLoad = async ({ locals }) => {
  return { user: locals.user };
};
```

## Form Actions

Handle form submissions server-side:

```typescript
// src/routes/orgs/+page.server.ts
import { fail } from "@sveltejs/kit";
import { superValidate } from "sveltekit-superforms";
import { zod } from "sveltekit-superforms/adapters";
import { z } from "zod";
import type { Actions } from "./$types";

const orgSchema = z.object({
  name: z.string().min(1, "Name is required"),
  email: z.string().email("Invalid email"),
});

export const actions: Actions = {
  create: async ({ request }) => {
    const form = await superValidate(request, zod(orgSchema));
    if (!form.valid) return fail(400, { form });
    await prisma.org.create({ data: form.data });
    return { form };
  },
  delete: async ({ request }) => {
    const data = await request.formData();
    const id = data.get("id") as string;
    await prisma.org.update({
      where: { id },
      data: { deleted: new Date() },
    });
  },
};
```

**Key features:**

- Named actions (`?/create`, `?/delete`)
- `superValidate` for type-safe form validation
- `fail()` returns error state without redirecting
- Progressive enhancement via `use:enhance`

## API Endpoints (+server.ts)

REST-style endpoints for direct HTTP access:

```typescript
// src/routes/api/orgs/+server.ts
import prisma from "$lib/server/prisma";
import { json, error } from "@sveltejs/kit";
import type { RequestHandler } from "./$types";

export const GET: RequestHandler = async ({ request, locals }) => {
  if (!locals.userId) throw error(401, "Unauthorized");

  const communityHash = request.headers.get("X-Community");
  const where = communityHash
    ? { org: { hash: communityHash }, deleted: null }
    : { deleted: null };

  const orgs = await prisma.org.findMany({ where });
  return json(orgs);
};

export const POST: RequestHandler = async ({ request, locals }) => {
  if (!locals.userId) throw error(401, "Unauthorized");

  const body = await request.json();
  const org = await prisma.org.create({ data: body });
  return json(org, { status: 201 });
};

export const DELETE: RequestHandler = async ({ params, locals }) => {
  if (!locals.userId) throw error(401, "Unauthorized");

  await prisma.org.update({
    where: { id: params.id },
    data: { deleted: new Date() },
  });
  return json({ success: true });
};
```

**Key features:**

- HTTP method handlers (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE)
- Access to `request`, `params`, `locals`, `cookies`
- `json()` helper for JSON responses
- `error()` for HTTP error responses

## Hooks (Middleware)

Global request handling:

```typescript
// src/hooks.server.ts
import type { Handle } from "@sveltejs/kit";

export const handle: Handle = async ({ event, resolve }) => {
  // CORS handling
  if (event.request.method === "OPTIONS") {
    return new Response(null, {
      headers: {
        "Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "*",
        "Access-Control-Allow-Methods": "GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS",
        "Access-Control-Allow-Headers":
          "Content-Type, Authorization, X-Community",
      },
    });
  }

  // Auth middleware
  const session = await getSession(event.cookies);
  event.locals.userId = session?.userId;
  event.locals.user = session?.user;

  const response = await resolve(event);

  // Add CORS headers to response
  response.headers.set("Access-Control-Allow-Origin", "*");

  return response;
};
```

**Key features:**

- Single `handle` function processes all requests
- `event.locals` carries data through the request lifecycle
- `resolve(event)` continues to the route handler
- Can chain multiple hooks with `sequence()`

## Component Data Access

```svelte
<!-- src/routes/orgs/+page.svelte -->
<script lang="ts">
  import type { PageData } from './$types';

  let { data }: { data: PageData } = $props();
</script>

{#each data.orgs as org}
  <div>{org.name}</div>
{/each}
```

## Forms in Components

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import { superForm } from 'sveltekit-superforms';
  import type { PageData } from './$types';

  let { data }: { data: PageData } = $props();
  const { form, errors, enhance, submitting } = superForm(data.form);
</script>

<form method="POST" action="?/create" use:enhance>
  <input name="name" bind:value={$form.name} />
  {#if $errors.name}<span class="error">{$errors.name}</span>{/if}
  <button type="submit" disabled={$submitting}>
    {$submitting ? 'Saving...' : 'Save'}
  </button>
</form>
```

## Client-Side Navigation

```svelte
<script>
  import { goto, invalidate, invalidateAll } from '$app/navigation';
  import { page } from '$app/stores';

  // Navigate
  goto('/orgs');

  // Refetch current page data
  invalidateAll();

  // Access current route info
  $page.url.pathname;
  $page.params.id;
</script>
```

## Prisma Isolation Pattern

```typescript
// $lib/server/prisma.ts (or server/prisma.ts)
import { PrismaClient } from "@prisma/client";

const prisma = new PrismaClient();
export default prisma;
```

**Rules:**

- Only import in `+page.server.ts`, `+layout.server.ts`, `+server.ts`, or `$lib/server/` files
- SvelteKit's `$lib/server/` directory is automatically excluded from client bundles
- For client-safe type imports, use `$prisma/browser`

## Migration Checklist Per Route

When migrating a route to TanStack Start:

1. [ ] Identify load function data dependencies
2. [ ] Create `createServerFn` equivalents for each data source
3. [ ] Convert form actions to POST server functions
4. [ ] Convert `+server.ts` endpoints to server functions or Start API routes
5. [ ] Update component to use server function calls instead of `data` prop
6. [ ] Replace `goto()` with TanStack Router `navigate()`
7. [ ] Replace `$page` store with router state
8. [ ] Replace `invalidate()` with server function re-calls
9. [ ] Remove SvelteKit-specific imports (`$app/*`, `./$types`)
10. [ ] Verify Prisma imports stay server-side
